title: CoffeeProxy
description: This mod allows joining Minecraft servers via a proxy (Fabric)
body:
# CoffeeProxy

CoffeeProxy is a simple HTTP/SOCKS5 proxy mod for Minecraft Fabric 1.21.10.

This can be used for testing proxy-blocking plugins and everything else (duh)

## Support/Whatever

Support if it breaks can be gotten [At the Discord!](https://discord.gg/4umJGqwftc)
Need a specific (recent) version? join my discord and ask! I picked versions to upload at random!

## Note regarding Hypixel Skyblock

If you use the mod Firmament on Hypixel Skyblock, it is suggested to use another one of my projects called [AntiFirmament](https://modrinth.com/mod/antifirmament) (or similar projects) to prevent Firmament from sending your MOD IDs to hypixel (why does this exist part 20)

## License

I am a catboy; therefore, everything is open source. Feel free to skid this 52 different times, I really don't care. If it breaks dm me on discord - @axle.coffee or open a github issue or fix it yourself and open a PR MY code is licensed under MIT

If there is any code that can't be distributed under an MIT license, please message me on discord or open an issue or whatever.
